scripts.test:game-rules: npm run test:maze-engine-vendor && node scripts/test-maze-engine-parity.cjs && node scripts/test-game-rules.cjs && node scripts/test-maze-skills.cjs && node scripts/test-game-rule-snapshot.cjs
scripts.test:maze-client: npm run test:maze-assets && node scripts/test-maze-authority-client-contract.cjs && node scripts/test-maze-authority-client.cjs && node scripts/test-maze-toon-rendering.cjs && node scripts/test-offline-turn.cjs && node scripts/test-live-board-visuals.cjs && node scripts/test-legacy-game-privacy.cjs
scripts.test:maze: npm run test:game-rules && npm run test:maze-client && npm --prefix functions test
scripts.test:database-rules: npm_config_cache=/tmp/daemok-npm-cache npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --only auth,database --project daemok-155c1 "node scripts/test-database-rules.cjs"
scripts.test:e2e:maze-authority: npm --prefix functions run build && npm_config_cache=/tmp/daemok-npm-cache node scripts/run-maze-authority-browser-emulators.cjs
